name: codebase-impact stops scanning a file after --max-per-file violations (default 50)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/codebase-impact.sh" --rule-file "$PWD/rule.yaml" --root "$PWD/tree" --max-per-file 50 --format json 2>impact.txt && grep -E "\"truncated\":true" impact.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p tree && for i in $(seq 1 200); do echo "console.log($i)"; done > tree/loud.js

printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: nc
    name: nc
    description: x
    detector: bash -c "grep -n console.log"
' > rule.yaml
